mapper.select: SELECT SP.ADDRESS AS address , COUNT(*) AS cnt , MIN(SM.SALES_DATE) AS first_date FROM sales_mst SM JOIN sales_dtl SD ON SD.SALES_ID = SM.SALES_ID JOIN product_mst P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = SD.PRODUCT_ID JOIN store_partner_mst SP ON SP.PARTNER_ID = P.PARTNER_ID WHERE SM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SM.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND SM.SALES_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND SP.ADDRESS IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(SP.ADDRESS) <> '' GROUP BY SP.ADDRESS
